caption: In an indoor basketball gymnasium with a wooden court, blue walls, and bleachers, a person wearing a pink tank top and dark shorts performs a jump toward a basketball hoop. Initially, the person is seen leaping upward with their right arm extended high toward the rim. As the sequence progresses, they reach the peak of their jump, soaring high in the air with their arm fully stretched upward near the hoop. The person then begins to descend, maintaining their vertical posture while falling back toward the court. Finally, they land on their feet on the blue perimeter of the court. A basketball hoop with a red rim and white backboard is mounted on the wall, and a grey trash bin is visible against the blue wall in the background. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
